en.extract:
The yellow-throated white-eye (Zosterops metcalfii) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is found in the Solomon Islands archipelago (Bougainville, Choiseul, Santa Isabel and Nggela Islands).

The '''yellow-throated white-eye''' ('''''Zosterops metcalfii''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Zosteropidae]]. It is found in the [[Solomon Islands (archipelago)|Solomon Islands archipelago]] ([[Bougainville Island|Bougainville]], [[Choiseul Island|Choiseul]], [[Santa Isabel Island|Santa Isabel]] and [[Nggela Islands]]).
